system.flavor: No, no, that's not how it happened.
system.effect:
Effect the following interrupt:

Deus Ex Machina
Interrupt, range 2-4
Trigger ally in range is damaged by a foe's ability, and the damaging ability resolves.
Effect [X]: Your ally may save. On a failed save, they may fly 1d3. On a successful save, they may fly twice as far. During this flight, they are unstoppable and immune to all damage.

Weave this ability resolves, grant 2 vigor to an adjacent ally. Increase by +1d6 for allies in crisis.
